title: Command Cockpit HUD Compression
summary: Compressed the selected-lane HUD into a denser Command Cockpit status bar so the mounted lane stage starts sooner.
proof: Added tested Command Cockpit CSS that tightens the active-lane HUD grid, padding, portraits, level meter, stat cells, and bot handoff block.
Hid long HUD subcopy only in the Cockpit stage because the mounted lane stage and stage lens already carry deeper context.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the HUD-compression unlock.
